name: White Clam Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare a 12-inch round pizza crust according to package directions.
3. Dust the crust with cornmeal.
4. Divide the clams evenly over the dough.
5. Top evenly with garlic, bacon, Romano cheese, and oregano.
6. Drizzle with Tabasco sauce and olive oil.
7. Bake for 15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
